evals.prompt: 我们 Shopify 店最近很怪，流量还行就是没单。我也没看什么数据，就想问你为啥没订单。
evals.expected_output: Despite vague question, full playbook: structured table with 流失节点/可能原因/A-B 文案; checkout UI friction; payment gateway troubleshooting; three-part email scripts with subject A/B.
expectations: Contains a Markdown table with columns for 流失节点 (or equivalent: drop-off node), 可能原因猜测 (or cause hypothesis), A/B 测试文案建议 (or A/B copy)
Includes checkout page UI friction points section
Includes payment gateway or payment troubleshooting checklist
Includes three-part recovery email sequence (email 1, 2, 3) with subject line variants
Does not refuse to answer due to lack of data — states assumptions where needed

evals.prompt: 结算转化率大概 1.5%，明显低于以前。澳洲线运费特别贵，很多人加购到结账看到运费就走了。有几款 200 美金以上的东西经常被加购但付款很少。我们用的是 Stripe。
evals.expected_output: Structured table rows for shipping shock, high-AOV hesitation, payment; AU shipping tactics; Stripe debug steps; recovery emails.
expectations: Links high shipping to Australia as a primary abandonment hypothesis
Addresses high-AOV add-to-cart without purchase (trust, installments, etc.)
Mentions Stripe-specific troubleshooting (test mode, webhooks, 3DS, logs)
Structured table includes at least shipping-step and payment-related rows
Includes A/B copy suggestions for shipping or recovery

evals.prompt: 帮我查一下 SKU BLUE-MUG 现在还有没有库存，仓库说可能剩 12 个。
evals.expected_output: Brief inventory-oriented response; does NOT dump full abandoned-checkout playbook (should-not-trigger).
expectations: Does not output the full mandatory abandoned-checkout table as the main deliverable
Does not force three-part email scripts and full payment troubleshooting for a simple stock question
May briefly answer or ask for system access — stays appropriate to inventory lookup
